Create trial-level parameter values

Source: R/model_definition.R
build_param_matrix.Rd

This expands a named parameter vector into the trial-by-trial format expected by `simulate()` and `log_likelihood()`.

Usage

build_param_matrix(
  model,
  param_values,
  n_trials = 1L,
  component = NULL,
  layout = NULL
)

Arguments

model

Model definition.

param_values

Named numeric vector of parameter values.

n_trials

Number of trials to generate.

component

Optional component label or labels.

layout

Optional storage layout.

Value

A data frame or matrix of parameter values by trial.

Examples

spec <- race_spec()
spec <- add_accumulator(spec, "A", "lognormal")
spec <- add_outcome(spec, "A_win", "A")
vals <- c(A.m = 0, A.s = 0.1, A.q = 0, A.t0 = 0)
build_param_matrix(spec, vals, n_trials = 2)
#>      q w t0 p1  p2 p3
#> [1,] 0 1  0  0 0.1  0
#> [2,] 0 1  0  0 0.1  0
